input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.11.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.11.4
            TITLE: passing rules do not apply to vehicles that are passing disabled vehicles on the course or

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.11.4: Passing rules do not apply to vehicles that are passing disabled vehicles on the course or
D.12.11.4 Passing rules do not apply to vehicles that are passing disabled vehicles on the course or 
vehicles that have spun out and are not moving.  When passing a disabled or off track vehicle, 
slow down, drive cautiously and be aware of all the vehicles and track workers in the area.

final_answer: Passing rules do not apply to vehicles that are passing disabled vehicles on the course or vehicles that have spun out and are not moving. When passing a disabled or off track vehicle, slow down, drive cautiously and be aware of all the vehicles and track workers in the area.
